title: Amalgamator
description:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a [orange]hulking six-armed figure[/orange] toiling away.
Its “face” is a [gold][sine]swirling vortex of glowing sigils[/sine][/gold] that shift about.

“One with an [aqua]Ascending Spirit[/aqua] has found my workshop? Let’s get [jitter]COMBINING[/jitter]!”
conditions: At least 2 basic removable Strike cards in deck
At least 2 basic removable Defend cards in deck
notes: You choose which 2 [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] cards to remove via a card selection screen. Only [gold]Basic[/gold] rarity Strike/Defend cards that are removable (not Seared) count toward the requirements and can be selected. Both options are always available as long as spawn conditions are met.
